caption:
Set within a magnificent palace, Four Seasons Hotel Firenze offers fantastic facilities, including a spa, spacious gardens🌿, a swimming pool, and stunning dining venues. With exceptional service and breathtaking views, this hotel also provides easy access to Florence’s iconic landmarks🏛️
